name: 🍳 Add a new recipe
about: Suggest or contribute a new recipe skill
title: '[RECIPE] '
labels: recipe, contribution
assignees: ''
---

## The dish

**Dish name:**
**Cuisine:**
**Brief description:** (one sentence — what is it, and why is it worth adding?)

## Why this recipe belongs here

- [ ] It is a real home-cooked dish I actually make
- [ ] It can be cooked in a normal home kitchen without specialist equipment
- [ ] It has at least one interesting or transferable technique worth teaching
- [ ] It is not already in the skills library

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything else to share: seasonal notes, regional variations, common mistakes, or why this dish matters to you.
